calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Julio Cesar Roam Torres and Lorena Lopez Herrera; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Alexandra Hill.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Lesley Guadalupe Roman Lopez to Leslie - First Name
Guadalupe - Middle Name
Roman Lopez - Last Name. The court also grants the petition for name change of Minor 2. Monserrat Jacinta Torres-Lopez to Monserrat - First Name
Jacinta - Middle Name
Roman Lopez - Last Name.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
